title: trisetum scabriusculum
intro: Trisetum scabriusculum, also known as the rough little oat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Trisetum scabriusculum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Trisetum scabriusculum include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water.
